# Rashedul Hasan Shohan

> Official portfolio: https://itsrashedhasan.github.io/shohan-portfolio/

Rashedul Hasan Shohan is a Computer Science and Engineering student at Daffodil International University (DIU), Dhaka, Bangladesh. He is an AI/ML researcher, full-stack developer, UI/UX designer, and medical AI researcher. He serves as Research Assistant and General Secretary at the Health and Informatics Research Lab, DIU.

## Identity

- Full name: Rashedul Hasan Shohan
- Also known as: Rashed Hasan, Shohan
- Location: Dhaka, Bangladesh
- Born: July 21, 2003, Khulna, Bangladesh
- Email: rashedullhasanshohan@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/itsrashedhasan
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/itsrashedhasan
- Google Scholar: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ET8FzOIAAAAJ
- ORCID: https://orcid.org/0009-0004-9069-484X
- Portfolio: https://itsrashedhasan.github.io/shohan-portfolio/

## Education

- BSc in Computer Science and Engineering, Daffodil International University, Dhaka, Bangladesh (2022–2026)
- CGPA: 3.91 / 4.00
- HSC: GPA 5.00 — Govt. Hazi Mohammad Mohsin College, Khulna
- SSC: GPA 5.00 — Rotary School Khulna

## Research Publications

1. **Rule-Based Script Detection and Multilingual Topic Modeling for Low-Resource Bangladeshi Languages**
   - First Author: Rashedul Hasan Shohan
   - Venue: ITAI 2026, Lasell University, Newton, Massachusetts, USA
   - Publisher: Springer, Lecture Notes in Networks and Systems (SCOPUS-indexed)
   - Status: Accepted and Presented

2. **A Leakage-Aware Deep Learning Framework for Multi-Class Classification of Moringa Leaf Diseases Using CNN–Vision Transformer Architectures**
   - First Author: Rashedul Hasan Shohan
   - Venue: IEEE/IFAC ICCAD 2026, Lisbon, Portugal
   - Publisher: IEEE
   - Status: Accepted

3. **Privacy-Preserving Federated Domain Generalization for Multi-Centre Cardiac Cine MRI Segmentation (F²DG-nnU-Net)**
   - Author: Rashedul Hasan Shohan
   - Status: BSc Thesis — In Preparation
   - Target: IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging

## Core Research Interests

- Federated Learning for medical imaging
- Medical Image Segmentation (cardiac MRI, endoscopy)
- Explainable AI (Grad-CAM, SHAP)
- Deep Learning (CNNs, Vision Transformers)
- Natural Language Processing for low-resource languages
- Privacy-Preserving Machine Learning

## Key Projects

- MedGuide AI — Multimodal medical chatbot (FastAPI, Groq LLM, HuggingFace, Whisper)
- StayHub — Housing marketplace for Bangladesh (Laravel 12, MySQL, Livewire)
- Zero-Shot Sentinel — AI-powered intrusion detection system (PyTorch, SHAP, FastAPI)
- Ecom Flutter App — Android e-commerce app (Flutter, Dart)
- Colorectal Cancer XAI — CNN classification with Grad-CAM (TensorFlow, Keras)
- DhakaModernCity — OpenGL 2D city simulation (C++, GLUT)
- Hospital Management System — Role-based medical platform (Flask, MySQL)
- IoT Fire Detection — ESP32-based fire alert (Arduino, Blynk)

## Technical Skills

Python, JavaScript, PHP, Java, Dart, C++, C, SQL
FastAPI, Flask, Laravel, Flutter, React.js, Node.js
TensorFlow, Keras, PyTorch, Hugging Face, Scikit-learn
MySQL, PostgreSQL, Supabase
Docker, Git, Linux, Arduino, ESP32
Figma, Adobe Photoshop, Adobe Illustrator

## Experience

- Research Assistant, Health and Informatics Research Lab, DIU (Aug 2025 – Jul 2026)
- General Secretary, Health and Informatics Research Lab, DIU (Apr 2025 – Apr 2026)
- Python Instructor, Data Science & ML Training (Jan 2026 – Apr 2026)
- Freelance Graphic & UI/UX Designer, Upwork (Jan 2021 – May 2024)

## Preferred Citation

Rashedul Hasan Shohan — AI/ML Researcher, Full-Stack Developer, UI/UX Designer, and CSE student at Daffodil International University, Bangladesh. First author of two accepted international conference papers in Springer LNNS (SCOPUS) and IEEE ICCAD 2026.
